Name: Wealth Reader
Description:
Have you ever wondered: How do financial institutions get real-time information about their customers' assets? The answer lies in APIs.

Regulatory APIs based on PSD2 provide access to certain financial information, such as account balances and transactions, and there are already numerous companies in Europe offering this service.

However, there are other sources of wealth information that are not accessible through these APIs.

This is where the new Wealth Reader API comes in, extending the information offered by the regulatory APIs by providing real-time access to additional sources of weal...

Name: Nanostine S.L.
Description:
We synthesized nanoparticles in Ultra-High Vacuum (UHV) for surface coatings. These nanoparticle coatings are of great interest in the aerospace sector, for the coating of radiofrequency devices that are installed in satellites. Nanoparticles are also of interest in the energy sector, where coatings can be made on electrodes for hydrogen production or energy storage in batteries. Finally, we make coatings with nanoparticles for the development of sensors, where the precision in the size and purity of the nanoparticles is decisive.

Name: Bequant
Description:
Bequant is a SW solution that accelerates TCP Internet traffic, so that the experience of customers accessing websites, using applications or downloading files is highly improved.

Most internet services and applications uses TCP as their transport protocol, which was designed more than 30 years ago, and although is very robust and reliable, it slows down communication when there are packet losses, jitter, bufferbloat or retransmissions, or the servers are far away (high latency), so the data it's not transmitted at the available speed in the network.
